source_notes: Groups are taken from the current project worldCupData.js, which was built from FIFA schedule/group data, and cross-checked against OpenFootball 2026 worldcup.json.
FIFA rankings are from the official inside.fifa.com ranking-overview API with dateId id15065, lastUpdateDate 2026-04-01 in returned rows.
World Football Elo ratings are from eloratings.net World.tsv fetched on 2026-05-31; response last-modified is stored in elo_source_date.
team_quality_v0 is calculated from World Football Elo, FIFA ranking points, Fjelstul historical World Cup data, group context, and host status.
PELE ratings, Tilt, and round-robin offense/defense fields are imported from Silver Bulletin Datawrapper CSV downloads linked from the PELE article.

team_quality_v2 is a PELE-forward recalibration using PELE as the dominant current-strength input while retaining World Football Elo, FIFA ranking points, World Cup history, group context, and host status. team_quality_v1 and pre-PELE team_quality_v0 are preserved for audit.

teams.pele_source_note: Imported from Silver Bulletin/Nate Silver PELE Datawrapper CSV downloads on 2026-06-01. Values are not inferred when missing.
teams.source_note: Team/group from the existing FIFA-sourced worldCupData.js and cross-checked against OpenFootball 2026 worldcup.json. FIFA ranking from inside.fifa.com ranking-overview API dateId id15065. Team Elo from eloratings.net World.tsv with en.teams.tsv name mapping. PELE rating, Tilt, and offense/defense fields imported from Silver Bulletin Datawrapper CSV downloads.

team_quality_v0.formula_note: 0.70 current strength, 0.17 historical World Cup performance, 0.08 knockout experience, 0.05 host bonus. Current strength combines World Football Elo and FIFA ranking points. PELE is not included because numeric ratings are not publicly reusable yet.

goals_clean_sheet_inputs_v0.note: Attack and defense proxy scores use current strength plus historical World Cup goal/clean-sheet rates. Group-specific goal and clean-sheet proxies are filled after group outlook is calculated.

group_outlook_v0.note: Proxy scores are not calibrated probabilities. They combine team quality, average opponent quality, and rank within the group.

tournament_outlook_v0.note: A first-pass tournament outlook for fantasy planning. Use with fixture difficulty and player data later.

team_quality_v1.formula_note: 0.70 current strength, 0.17 historical World Cup performance, 0.08 knockout experience, 0.05 host bonus. Current strength uses normalized PELE rating, World Football Elo, and FIFA ranking points. Missing numeric inputs are left null and excluded from their weighted blend.

goals_clean_sheet_inputs_v1.note: Attack and defense proxy scores now blend current strength with PELE round-robin goals-for/goals-against where available. Missing PELE values are not imputed.

group_outlook_v1.note: Proxy scores are not calibrated probabilities. They combine PELE-backed team quality, average opponent quality, and rank within the group.

tournament_outlook_v1.note: A PELE-backed first-pass tournament outlook for fantasy planning. Use with fixture difficulty and player data.

team_quality_v2.formula_note: 0.82 current strength, 0.10 historical World Cup performance, 0.04 knockout experience, 0.04 host bonus. Current strength is PELE-forward: 0.62 normalized PELE, 0.23 World Football Elo, and 0.15 FIFA ranking points. Missing numeric inputs are left null and excluded from their weighted blend.

goals_clean_sheet_inputs_v2.note: Attack and defense proxy scores are PELE-forward blends using current strength plus PELE round-robin goals-for/goals-against where available. Missing PELE values are not imputed.

group_outlook_v2.note: Proxy scores are not calibrated probabilities. They combine PELE-backed team quality, average opponent quality, and rank within the group.

tournament_outlook_v2.note: A PELE-backed first-pass tournament outlook for fantasy planning. Use with fixture difficulty and player data.

goals_clean_sheet_inputs_v1.note: Attack and defense proxy scores now blend current strength with PELE round-robin goals-for/goals-against where available. Missing PELE values are not imputed.

group_outlook_v1.note: Proxy scores are not calibrated probabilities. They combine PELE-backed team quality, average opponent quality, and rank within the group.

tournament_outlook_v1.note: A PELE-backed first-pass tournament outlook for fantasy planning. Use with fixture difficulty and player data.
